fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the routing number.
The program automatically retrieves the routing number from the No. field on the routing header.
The program uses the routing number to link the routing header with the routing lines.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the version code.
The program automatically retrieves the version code from the Version Code field on the Routing table. If the actual routing line is not a part of a routing version, then this field is empty.
The program uses the version code to link the Routing Version table with the routing lines.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the operation number for this routing line.

fields.name: Next Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next operation number. You use this field if you use parallel routings.

fields.name: Previous Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the previous operation number, which is automatically assigned.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the kind of capacity type to use for the actual operation.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Work Center No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the work center number.
If the capacity is a work center, the program copies the value from the No. field of this routing line. If it is a machine center, the program copies the value of the Work Center No. field on the machine center card.

fields.name: Work Center Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the work center group code.
The program copies the value from the Work Center Group Code on the work center card.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry.

fields.name: Setup Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the setup time of the operation.

fields.name: Run Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the run time of the operation.

fields.name: Wait Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the wait time according to the value in the Wait Time Unit of Measure field.

fields.name: Move Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the move time according to the value in the Move Time Unit of Measure field.

fields.name: Fixed Scrap Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fixed scrap quantity.

fields.name: Lot Size
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items that are included in the same operation at the same time. The run time on routing lines is reduced proportionally to the lot size. For example, if the lot size is two pieces, the run time will be reduced by half.

fields.name: Scrap Factor %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the scrap factor in percent.

fields.name: Setup Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the setup time of the operation.

fields.name: Run Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the run time of the operation.

fields.name: Wait Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the wait time.

fields.name: Move Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the move time.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional description text.

fields.name: Minimum Process Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a minimum process time.

fields.name: Maximum Process Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a maximum process time.

fields.name: Concurrent Capacities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of machines or persons that are working concurrently.

fields.name: Send-Ahead Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the send-ahead quantity.

fields.name: Routing Link Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routing link code.

fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a standard task.

fields.name: Unit Cost per
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost for this operation if it is different than the unit cost on the work center or machine center card.

fields.name: Recalculate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the routing line has to be recalculated.
If you do not recalculate, the changing of this routing line has no effect on the planning.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether any comments have been entered for this routing line.
To view a comment or create a new one, click the Actions icon, point to Operation, and then click Comments. A window appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox. Notes follow documents when they are posted in the same way as comments.
The program automatically returns the entry to the Comment field if there is an entry in the Comments window.
You cannot edit or delete the contents of this field.

fields.name: Sequence No. (Forward)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the sequence number. Here the sequence of operations is taken into account in the forward scheduling.
The program fills in this field automatically.

fields.name: Sequence No. (Backward)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the sequence number. Here the sequence of operations is taken into account in the backward scheduling.
The program fills in this field automatically.

fields.name: Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the accumulated fixed scrap quantity that was produced with this routing.
Example
The following example shows how the accumulated fixed scrap quantity is calculated.
Fixed scrap quantity of operation 1 is 3 pieces.
Fixed scrap quantity of operation 2 is 1 piece.
No other operation have fixed scrap.
The accumulated fixed scrap quantity is 4.

fields.name: Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the accumulated scrap factor for this routing.
The accumulated scrap factor is calculated on the basis of the individual tasks.
